banner.title: Cookies and privacy
banner.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to run the site, measure usage, and load embedded third-party services (e.g. map, contact form). You can change your choices at any time.

dialog.title: Cookie preferences
dialog.description: Choose the categories you want to allow. Strictly necessary technologies are required for the site to work.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: Required for core functionality, security, and storing your consent; cannot be disabled.

measurement.title: Statistics & analytics
measurement.description: Helps us understand how the site is used (e.g. Google Analytics, Hotjar).

marketing.title: Marketing & embedded content
marketing.description: Enables embedded services such as Google Maps and Google reCAPTCHA on the contact form.

content.title: Cookie policy
content.intro: This page explains which cookies and similar technologies we use and which providers are involved. For legal bases and further details on personal data, please see our privacy policy.
content.settingsIntro: You can change and save your consent for analytics and marketing at any time.

sectionIntro.necessary: Technically required functions and consent handling. Without these elements we cannot operate the site in a compliant way.
sectionIntro.measurement: Only if you consent: pseudonymous analytics to improve our website.
sectionIntro.marketing: Only if you consent: services that transfer data to Google and others (map, reCAPTCHA).

necessary.name: Local storage of your consent
necessary.purpose: Stores and retrieves your cookie preferences in the browser (e.g. localStorage). This mechanism does not by itself transmit data to our servers.

necessary.name: c15t
necessary.purpose: Provides the consent UI and client-side storage logic in the browser.

necessary.name: Bulletproof Software Inc.
necessary.purpose: Delivers feature flags and content variants for the website.

measurement.name: Google Ireland Limited
measurement.purpose: Creates statistics about site usage (page views, approximate origin, device type) when you consent.

measurement.name: Hotjar Ltd.
measurement.purpose: Analyses usage patterns (e.g. anonymised heatmaps / session insights) when you consent.

marketing.name: Google Ireland Limited
marketing.purpose: Shows an interactive map on the contact page; this may transfer data such as IP address and usage data to Google.

marketing.name: Google Ireland Limited
marketing.purpose: Protects the contact form from automated abuse (spam) and transfers data to Google.

seo.description: Overview of cookies, similar technologies, and third-party providers (Google Analytics, Hotjar, Google Maps, reCAPTCHA, Flagsmith) on duecker-medizintechnik.de.
seo.title: Cookie policy
